title: ERROR: Drawings recorded as expense
content: Symptom: ghar kharcha under miscellaneous expense. Correct: Drawings account. Understates equity.

title: ERROR: Loan as income
content: Symptom: loan as other income. Correct: Loan Payable liability.

title: ERROR: Fixed asset as expense
content: Symptom: furniture/computer as purchase expense. Correct: Fixed Asset + depreciation.

title: ERROR: Missing creditor on credit purchase
content: Must credit named supplier account — payable not tracked otherwise.

title: ERROR: Debtor payment as new sales
content: Double-counts revenue. Dr Cash Cr Receivable only.

title: ERROR: Missing VAT on sales
content: VAT-registered: separate Sales and VAT Output liability.

title: ERROR: Advance as sales
content: Record as Advance from Customer liability until delivery.

title: ERROR: Missing TDS on rent/fees
content: Deduct TDS at applicable rate, deposit IRD — verify with CA/Finance Act.
